2026-04-28 China

Day 1 in Shanghai

Shanghai is a city of immense scale and history.

Walking through the Bund is like stepping back in time. The colonial-era buildings on one side of the river and the futuristic skyscrapers of Pudong on the other create a stunning contrast.

The Bund

The Bund was interesting.

The Botanical Gardens

They were also interesting.

Must-Do in Shanghai

  • Visit the Bund.
  • Explore the Yu Garden.
  • Walk through the French Concession.
